questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q:
Paragraph: There is a spherical glass ball of refractive index $\mu_1$ and another glass ball of refractive index $\mu_2$ inside it as shown in figure. The radius of the outer ball is $R_1$ and that of inner ball is $R_2$. A ray is incident on the outer surface of the ball at an angle $i_1$.
Question: Find the value of $r_1$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
